hallucination.rationale: The HPI content that is present is accurate to the transcript. The note says 'diet modification' which is a minor embellishment — the transcript says they 'told him to watch his diet,' not that diet modification was a treatment.

instruction_following.rationale: The note catastrophically fails instruction following. Template placeholder text and instructions in brackets are left throughout the entire note (e.g., '[Fever, chills, fatigue, weight changes]', '(If not documented, state "Not documented")'). The Review of Systems should have been omitted entirely per instructions. Nearly every section beyond the Chief Complaint and HPI contains raw template instructions instead of actual content or appropriate handling.

completeness.rationale: The note only captures the chief complaint and HPI. It is missing the entire physical examination findings, assessment/diagnosis, all medications (colchicine, prednisone, allopurinol discussion), labs ordered, social history (alcohol use, diet), dietary counseling, treatment plan, follow-up instructions, past medical history of gout, and all other substantive content from the transcript.
missed_items: Physical exam findings (swelling, erythema, taut/shiny skin, warmth, tenderness of left 1st MTP, other joints normal)
Allopurinol discussion for future urate-lowering therapy
Dietary counseling (red meat, organ meats, shellfish, beer)
Call if no improvement in 48 hours
No history of diabetes, stomach ulcers, or kidney problems
Side effect counseling for colchicine and prednisone

template_adherence.rationale: The output contains raw template placeholder text and instructions in brackets/parentheses throughout virtually every section. The entire note from Review of Systems onward is just the unfilled template repeated dozens of times.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted anywhere in the note. No {{drug:...}} or {{condition:...}} syntax is present.

duplication.rationale: The entire note structure is duplicated approximately 25+ times, with the same Chief Complaint and HPI repeated over and over along with the unfilled template sections.
